author: śrīmad vallabhācārya
verses:
adharaṁ madhuraṁ vadanaṁ madhuraṁ
nayanaṁ madhuraṁ hasitaṁ madhuram
hṛdayaṁ madhuraṁ gamanaṁ madhuraṁ
madhurādhi⋅pateḥ⋅akhilaṁ madhuram

vacanaṁ madhuraṁ caritaṁ madhuraṁ
vasanaṁ madhuraṁ valitaṁ madhuram
calitaṁ madhuraṁ bhramitaṁ madhuraṁ
madhurādhi⋅pateḥ⋅akhilaṁ madhuram

veṇurmadhuro reṇurmadhuraḥ
pāṇirmadhuraḥ pādau madhurau
nṛtyaṁ madhuraṁ sakhyaṁ madhuraṁ
madhurādhi⋅pateḥ⋅akhilaṁ madhuram

gītaṁ madhuraṁ pītaṁ madhuraṁ
bhuktaṁ madhuraṁ suptaṁ madhuram
rūpaṁ madhuraṁ tilakaṁ madhuraṁ
madhurādhi⋅pateḥ⋅akhilaṁ madhuram

karaṇaṁ madhuraṁ taraṇaṁ madhuraṁ
haraṇaṁ madhuraṁ ramaṇaṁ madhuram
vamitaṁ madhuraṁ śamitaṁ madhuraṁ
madhurādhi⋅pateḥ⋅akhilaṁ madhuram

guñjā madhurā mālā madhurā
jamunā madhurā vīcī madhurā
salilaṁ madhuraṁ kamalaṁ madhuraṁ
madhurādhi⋅pateḥ⋅akhilaṁ madhuram

gopī madhurā līlā madhurā
juktaṁ madhuraṁ bhuktaṁ madhuram
hṛṣṭaṁ madhuraṁ śliṣṭaṁ madhuraṁ
madhurādhi⋅pateḥ⋅akhilaṁ madhuram

gopā madhurā gāvo madhurā
jaṣṭirmadhurā sṛṣṭirmadhurā
dalitaṁ madhuraṁ phalitaṁ madhuraṁ
madhurādhi⋅pateḥ⋅akhilaṁ madhuram
en_translation:
His lips are sweet, His face is sweet, His eyes are sweet, His smile is sweet, His heart is sweet, His walking is sweet—everything about the Lord of sweetness is sweet.

His words are sweet, His character is sweet, His garments are sweet, His graceful posture is sweet, His movements are sweet, and His wandering is sweet—everything about the Lord of sweetness is sweet.

His flute is sweet, the dust from His feet is sweet, His hands are sweet, His feet are sweet, His dancing is sweet, and His friendship is sweet—everything about the Lord of sweetness is sweet.

His singing is sweet, His drinking is sweet, His eating is sweet, His sleeping is sweet, His form is sweet, and His sacred mark is sweet—everything about the Lord of sweetness is sweet.

His actions are sweet, His victory is sweet, His charm is sweet, His play is sweet, His emanations are sweet, and His peacefulness is sweet—everything about the Lord of sweetness is sweet.

His berries are sweet, His garland is sweet, the Yamunā is sweet, its waves are sweet, its water is sweet, and its lotus flowers are sweet—everything about the Lord of sweetness is sweet.

His gopīs are sweet, His divine pastimes are sweet, His association is sweet, His enjoyment is sweet, His happiness is sweet, and His embrace is sweet—everything about the Lord of sweetness is sweet.

His cowherd friends are sweet, His cows are sweet, His staff is sweet, His creation is sweet, His conquering is sweet, and His blessings are sweet—everything about the Lord of sweetness is sweet.
